title: gloriously greasy aussie kfc burger
description: a post-workout treat featuring double-fried KFC chicken and a sweet and tangy sauce made with canned tomatoes. perfect for a lazy day after a tough workout at the beach.
instructions: heat a large skillet over medium-high heat, add 1/4 cup of oil, and cook the double-fried KFC chicken breast for 2-3 minutes on each side.
in a small bowl, whisk together the mayonnaise, hot sauce, brown sugar, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
add the crushed tomatoes to the bowl and stir to combine.

assemble the burger by spreading a layer of the tomato-mayo sauce on the bottom bun, followed by a slice of melted cheddar cheese, a few slices of the double-fried KFC chicken, a slice of Canadian bacon, and finally the top bun.
reheat the assembled burger in the skillet for 1-2 minutes on each side, or until the cheese is melted and the buns are toasted.
remove the burger from the skillet and top with lettuce, tomato, and additional crispy bacon if desired.
repeat for remaining burgers and serve immediately.
serve the burgers on a lazy Susan spinner to keep them warm and to make serving easy.
consider making a side of fries or sweet potato fries for a complete meal.
do not overcrowd the skillet when cooking the burgers, cook in batches if necessary.
be careful when working with hot oil and sharp objects.
have fun and enjoy your delicious Gloriously Greasy Aussie KFC Burger!
